'''鈭歾-z-j''' ('''shazazaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mystify|mystify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mystify|mystify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-z-j
|-
! Lemma
| shazazaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazaj|thizazaj]] || [[word:jizazaj|jizazaj]] || [[word:shizazaj|shizazaj]] || [[word:kizazaj|kizazaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzazaj|thuthuzazaj]] || [[word:jujuzazaj|jujuzazaj]] || [[word:shushuzazaj|shushuzazaj]] || [[word:kukuzazaj|kukuzazaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzazaj|thuzazaj]] || [[word:juzazaj|juzazaj]] || [[word:shuzazaj|shuzazaj]] || [[word:kuzazaj|kuzazaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzazaj|thuzazaj]] || [[word:juzazaj|juzazaj]] || [[word:shuzazaj|shuzazaj]] || [[word:kuzazaj|kuzazaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezazaj|thezazaj]] || [[word:jezazaj|jezazaj]] || [[word:shezazaj|shezazaj]] || [[word:kezazaj|kezazaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozazaj|thothozazaj]] || [[word:jojozazaj|jojozazaj]] || [[word:shoshozazaj|shoshozazaj]] || [[word:kokozazaj|kokozazaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozazaj|thozazaj]] || [[word:jozazaj|jozazaj]] || [[word:shozazaj|shozazaj]] || [[word:kozazaj|kozazaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozazaj|thozazaj]] || [[word:jozazaj|jozazaj]] || [[word:shozazaj|shozazaj]] || [[word:kozazaj|kozazaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zazaj|th忙zazaj]] || [[word:j忙zazaj|j忙zazaj]] || [[word:sh忙zazaj|sh忙zazaj]] || [[word:k忙zazaj|k忙zazaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazazaj|thathazazaj]] || [[word:jajazazaj|jajazazaj]] || [[word:shashazazaj|shashazazaj]] || [[word:kakazazaj|kakazazaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazazaj|thazazaj]] || [[word:jazazaj|jazazaj]] || [[word:shazazaj|shazazaj]] || [[word:kazazaj|kazazaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazazaj|thazazaj]] || [[word:jazazaj|jazazaj]] || [[word:shazazaj|shazazaj]] || [[word:kazazaj|kazazaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazazaj|shazazaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazazaj|goshazazaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazazaj|gokishazazaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazazajn眉|shazazajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazazajnkn眉|goshazazajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazajn眉|gokishazazajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazazajsh毛|shazazajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazazajnksh毛|goshazazajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazazajsh毛|gokishazazajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazajro|shazazajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazajnkro|goshazazajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazajro|gokishazazajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazajmu|shazazajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazajnkmu|goshazazajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazajmu|gokishazazajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazazajsher|shazazajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazazajnksher|goshazazajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazazajsher|gokishazazajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazazajng|shazazajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazazajnkng|goshazazajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazazajng|gokishazazajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazazajya|shazazajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazazajnkya|goshazazajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazazajya|gokishazazajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazazajyam|shazazajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazazajnkyam|goshazazajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazazajyam|gokishazazajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazajn眉sh毛|shazazajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazajnkn眉sh毛|goshazazajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazajn眉sh毛|gokishazazajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazajn眉ro|shazazajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazajnkn眉ro|goshazazajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazajn眉ro|gokishazazajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazajn眉mu|shazazajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazajnkn眉mu|goshazazajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazajn眉mu|gokishazazajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazajsh毛n眉|shazazajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazajnksh毛n眉|goshazazajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazajsh毛n眉|gokishazazajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazajsh毛ro|shazazajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazajnksh毛ro|goshazazajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazajsh毛ro|gokishazazajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazajsh毛mu|shazazajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazajnksh毛mu|goshazazajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazajsh毛mu|gokishazazajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazajron眉|shazazajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazajnkron眉|goshazazajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazajron眉|gokishazazajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazajrosh毛|shazazajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazajnkrosh毛|goshazazajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazajrosh毛|gokishazazajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazajromu|shazazajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazajnkromu|goshazazajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazajromu|gokishazazajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazajmun眉|shazazajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazajnkmun眉|goshazazajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazajmun眉|gokishazazajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazajmush毛|shazazajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazajnkmush毛|goshazazajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazajmush毛|gokishazazajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazajmuro|shazazajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazajnkmuro|goshazazajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazajmuro|gokishazazajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
